name: smart_classroom_audio_summary
description: Transcribe classroom audio and generate a structured Markdown summary using the Smart Classroom ASR + LLM pipeline.

audio_file.description: Absolute path to the classroom audio file (WAV, MP3, M4A).

audio_filename.description: Filename of an audio file already present in the Smart Classroom upload directory.

session_id.description: Optional existing Smart Classroom session ID to reuse.

include_transcript.description: Whether to include the full transcription text in the output.

session_id.description: Smart Classroom session identifier. Pass this to smart_classroom_mindmap to chain the skills.

summary_markdown.description: Generated classroom summary in Markdown format. Pass this to smart_classroom_mindmap as 'summary_markdown'.

source.description: Indicates how the audio was supplied.

notes: Requires the Smart Classroom runtime environment (ASR model, LLM summarizer, config.yaml, runtime_config.yaml).
The PYTHONPATH / working directory must be set to education-ai-suite/smart-classroom.
Output 'session_id' and 'summary_markdown' can be passed directly to smart_classroom_mindmap.
